Main table → Comparison And Predicates → Maximum

Maximum

Instruction Type and Width     Instruction description
                               Performs maximum operation between two sources. Each
Vector Maximum                 source is 32-bit wide. The destination is 32-bit and the VPREX bit
                               is updated accordingly.
                               Performs two maximum operations between two sources. Each
Vector Maximum Word Parts      source is 16-bit wide. The results are packed into 32-bit

destination and the VPREX bit is updated accordingly.
